CREATE TABLE test_table (c1 UInt32, c2 String, c3 DateTime, c4 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c1;
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test1', now());
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, 'test2', now(), 10);
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2) VALUES (3, 'test3') EXCEPT (c4);
INSERT INTO test_table DEFAULT VALUES;
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2, c3, c4) VALUES (4, 'test4', now(), default);
INSERT INTO test_table (SELECT c1, c2, now(), c4 FROM another_table);
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2, c3) FORMAT CSV ('5', 'test5', 'now()');
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (6, 'test6', toDateTime('2023-10-01 10:00:00'));
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2, c4) VALUES (7, 'test7', 20) SETTINGS insert_null_as_default = 1;
CREATE TABLE another_table (c1 UInt32, c2 String, c4 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c1;
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, 'source1', 30), (2, 'source2', 40);
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2, c4) SELECT c1, c2, c4 FROM another_table WHERE c4 > 30;
CREATE TABLE compressed_table (c1 UInt32, c2 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c1;
INSERT INTO compressed_table (c1, c2) FORMAT CSVWithNames SETTINGS input_format_csv_delimiter = ',';
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2) VALUES (8, 'test8') ON CONFLICT UPDATE;
INSERT INTO test_table (SELECT * FROM compressed_table WHERE c1 <= 8);
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (9, 'test9', now()) SETTINGS async_insert=1;
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2) VALUES (10, 'test10') EXCEPT (c3);
INSERT INTO test_table (c1, c2) SELECT c1, c2 FROM another_table WHERE c1 % 2 = 0;
INSERT INTO test_table (SELECT 11 as c1, 'test11' as c2, now() as c3, 100 as c4);
